name: FF Admin - Content Request Intake - Draft

nodes.name: Platform Content Request Webhook
nodes.notes: Webhook is intentionally draft/inactive. Protect with signature validation before activation.

nodes.name: Validate Draft Request
nodes.notes: Draft code placeholder. No credentials or external calls.

nodes.name: Respond To Platform
nodes.notes: Returns a safe acknowledgement or dry-run result.

nodes.name: Prepare Signed Mock Callback
nodes.notes: Builds a signed mock completion callback after the webhook response is sent to CP.

nodes.name: Send Signed Callback To CP
nodes.notes: Sends mock completion back to the CP callback endpoint. Requires PLATFORM_CALLBACK_SECRET to be available to n8n as an environment variable.
